title: Cross-Platform E-Commerce App
description: Full-featured e-commerce application built with React Native, supporting iOS and Android with real-time inventory management and secure payment processing.

title: Healthcare Management Platform
description: A comprehensive web and mobile platform for healthcare providers to manage appointments, patient records, and telemedicine consultations.

title: Real Estate Listing App
description: Feature-rich real estate app with interactive maps, virtual tours, and AI-powered property recommendations for buyers and agents.

title: SaaS Dashboard & Analytics
description: Modern analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization, role-based access control, and automated reporting for business intelligence.
